title: HealthConnect readRecords by ID skips enforceSelfRead package filter
pattern: Authorization bypass via alternative code path
notes: When reading records by ID (RecordIdFiltersParcel != null), maybeEnforceOnlyCallingPackageDataRequested is explicitly skipped (line 712-716). Has acknowledged TODO(b/309778116). App with only WRITE permission (enforceSelfRead=true) should only read own data, but when reading by UUID obtained from getChangeLogs, this enforcement is bypassed. Combined with HC-2: getChangeLogs reveals UUIDs of other apps' records.
